summary: Admin User Removal feature tested successfully. Backend DELETE /api/admin/users/{user_id} endpoint and frontend User Management trash icon + confirmation modal all working correctly.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing users in database
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin user removal feature fully functional. Backend endpoint DELETE /api/admin/users/{user_id} requires admin auth, prevents self-deletion (400), returns 404 for non-existent users, and returns 403 for non-admin users. Frontend shows trash icon (Trash2) on each user row in admin User Management section with data-testid='remove-user-{username}'. Clicking opens confirmation modal (data-testid='remove-user-modal') with warning about permanent deletion. Cancel closes modal, Confirm removes user from list without page reload.

backend_tests.test_admin_cannot_delete_self: PASS - Admin self-deletion returns 400 with correct message
backend_tests.test_non_admin_gets_403: PASS - Regular user cannot delete users
backend_tests.test_admin_users_list_endpoint: PASS - GET /admin/users returns user list with correct structure
backend_tests.test_admin_users_role_filter: PASS - Role filter returns only admins when filtered
backend_tests.test_delete_endpoint_exists: PASS - DELETE endpoint is routed correctly
backend_tests.test_full_user_removal_flow: PASS - Integration test verified endpoint logic

frontend_tests.user_rows_displayed: PASS - 45 user rows found with data-testid='user-row-{username}'
frontend_tests.remove_modal_appears: PASS - data-testid='remove-user-modal' appears on trash click
frontend_tests.modal_warning_text: PASS - Modal contains warning about permanent deletion
frontend_tests.cancel_button: PASS - data-testid='cancel-remove-btn' present and closes modal

features_verified: DELETE /api/admin/users/{user_id} endpoint exists and requires admin auth
Admin cannot delete themselves (returns 400 with error message)
Trash icon (Trash2 from lucide-react) visible on each user row
Confirmation modal with data-testid='remove-user-modal' appears on click
Modal shows username and warning about permanent deletion
Modal has confirm (red) and cancel (yellow) buttons
Cancel button closes modal without action
